features.name: Fighting Style
features.text: Adopt a fighting style (e.g. Defense: +1 AC while wearing armor).

features.name: Second Wind
features.text: Once per short/long rest, a bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP.

features.name: Action Surge
features.text: Once per short/long rest, take one additional action on your turn.

features.name: Martial Archetype
features.text: Choose a martial archetype that shapes your approach to battle.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: Attack twice, instead of once, when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Indomitable
features.text: Reroll a failed saving throw; once per long rest.

resources.name: Second Wind
resources.text: Uses of Second Wind (bonus action, regain 1d10 + fighter level HP); regained on a short or long rest.

resources.name: Action Surge
resources.text: Uses of Action Surge (one additional action on your turn); regained on a short or long rest.

resources.name: Indomitable
resources.text: Uses of Indomitable (reroll a failed saving throw); regained on a long rest.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast wizard spells using Intelligence. Prepare INT mod + wizard level spells from your spellbook each day.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.text: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totalling up to half your wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Arcane Tradition
features.text: Choose an arcane tradition that shapes your magic.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast sorcerer spells using Charisma. You know a fixed set of spells, swapping one each level.

features.name: Sorcerous Origin
features.text: Choose the source of your innate magic.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.text: You gain Sorcery Points and can convert them to/from spell slots (Flexible Casting).

features.name: Metamagic
features.text: Twist your spells using Sorcery Points (e.g. Twinned, Quickened Spell).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

resources.name: Sorcery Points
resources.text: Spent on Metamagic and Flexible Casting; regained on a long rest.

features.name: Otherworldly Patron
features.text: Choose a patron whose bargain grants your power.

features.name: Pact Magic
features.text: Cast warlock spells using Charisma. Your few slots are all your highest level and recharge on a SHORT or long rest.

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.text: Learn fragments of forbidden knowledge that grant magical abilities.

features.name: Pact Boon
features.text: Your patron grants a gift: Pact of the Chain, Blade, or Tome.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Mystic Arcanum
features.text: Gain one high-level spell you can cast once per long rest without a pact slot (6th at 11th, 7th/8th/9th later).

features.name: Rage
features.text: As a bonus action, enter a rage for up to 1 minute: advantage on STR checks/saves, bonus melee damage (+2, rising to +3 at 9th and +4 at 16th), and resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage.

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.text: While wearing no armor, your AC equals 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier (a shield still adds its bonus).

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.text: Gain advantage on STR melee attacks this turn, but attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.

features.name: Danger Sense
features.text: Advantage on DEX saves against effects you can see.

features.name: Primal Path
features.text: Choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Fast Movement
features.text: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Brutal Critical
features.text: Roll one extra weapon damage die on a critical hit (more at 13th and 17th).

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.text: Dropping to 0 HP while raging lets you make a CON save to stay at 1 HP instead.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.text: Your rage ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.text: If a STR check is lower than your STR score, use your score instead.

features.name: Primal Champion
features.text: Your STR and CON scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 24.

resources.name: Rage
resources.text: Number of times you can rage between long rests (-1 = unlimited at 20th).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast cleric spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + cleric level spells from the cleric list each day; you know 3 cantrips at 1st level.

features.name: Divine Domain
features.text: Choose a divine domain that grants bonus spells and features.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.text: Channel divine energy for magical effects, regaining uses on a short or long rest. You gain more uses per rest as you level (1 at 2nd, 2 at 6th, 3 at 18th).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
features.text: As an action, present your holy symbol; each undead within 30 feet that fails a Wisdom save is turned for 1 minute.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Destroy Undead
features.text: When an undead fails its save against your Turn Undead, it is instantly destroyed if its CR is at or below a threshold that rises with your level (CR 1/2 at 5th, up to CR 4 at 17th).

features.name: Divine Intervention
features.text: Call on your deity to intervene; succeed if you roll your cleric level or lower on percentile dice (automatic at 20th level). One use per long rest on success, or once per 7 days.

resources.name: Channel Divinity
resources.text: Spent on Channel Divinity options (Turn Undead, domain options); regained on a short or long rest.

name: Bard
tool_proficiencies: three musical instruments of your choice

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast bard spells using Charisma. You know a fixed set of bard spells and 2 cantrips at 1st level, learning and swapping more as you level.

features.name: Bardic Inspiration
features.text: As a bonus action, give a creature a Bardic Inspiration die (d6, rising to d8/d10/d12 at 5th/10th/15th level) it can add to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes. Uses equal to your Charisma modifier, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Jack of All Trades
features.text: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include it.

features.name: Song of Rest
features.text: During a short rest, allies who spend Hit Dice regain extra hit points (1d6, rising with level).

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 10th level.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Font of Inspiration
features.text: You regain all expended Bardic Inspiration uses on a short or long rest.

features.name: Countercharm
features.text: As an action, grant yourself and allies within 30 feet advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed.

features.name: Magical Secrets
features.text: Learn two spells from any class's spell list; more at 14th and 18th level.

features.name: Superior Inspiration
features.text: When you roll initiative with no Bardic Inspiration uses left, you regain one.

features.name: Druidic
features.text: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids, and can leave hidden messages in it.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast druid spells using Wisdom. Prepare WIS mod + druid level spells from the druid list each day; you know 2 cantrips at 1st level. Druids won't wear armor or use shields made of metal.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.text: As an action, magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen (max CR and form options rise with level). Two uses, regained on a short or long rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.text: You age far more slowly; for every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.

features.name: Beast Spells
features.text: You can cast many druid spells while in a Wild Shape form.

features.name: Archdruid
features.text: You can use Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.

resources.name: Wild Shape
resources.text: Uses of Wild Shape, regained on a short or long rest (unlimited at 20th level).

name: Monk
tool_proficiencies: one type of artisan's tools or one musical instrument

features.name: Unarmored Defense
features.text: While you wear no armor and use no shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Martial Arts
features.text: Use Dexterity for unarmed strikes and monk weapons, roll a d4 in place of their normal damage (rising to d6/d8/d10 at 5th/11th/17th level), and make one unarmed strike as a bonus action when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Ki
features.text: You have ki points equal to your monk level, spent on Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind. You regain all ki on a short or long rest. Ki save DC = 8 + proficiency + Wisdom modifier.

features.name: Unarmored Movement
features.text: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you wear no armor and use no shield (rising with level); from 9th level you can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids.

features.name: Deflect Missiles
features.text: Use a reaction to reduce damage from a ranged weapon attack; reduce it to 0 and you can catch and throw the missile, spending 1 ki.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Slow Fall
features.text: Use a reaction to reduce falling damage by five times your monk level.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: You can attack twice whenever you take the Attack action.

features.name: Stunning Strike
features.text: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki to attempt to stun the target (Constitution save).

features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
features.text: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity.

features.name: Evasion
features.text: When you make a Dexterity save for half damage, you instead take no damage on a success and half on a failure.

features.name: Stillness of Mind
features.text: Use an action to end one effect on yourself causing you to be charmed or frightened.

features.name: Purity of Body
features.text: You're immune to disease and poison.

features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
features.text: You can understand and be understood by any creature that has a language.

features.name: Diamond Soul
features.text: You gain proficiency in all saving throws; spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.text: You no longer suffer the frailty of old age and can't be aged magically; you need no food or water.

features.name: Empty Body
features.text: Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute; spend 8 ki to cast astral projection.

features.name: Perfect Self
features.text: When you roll initiative with no ki left, you regain 4 ki.

resources.name: Ki
resources.text: Ki points (equal to your monk level), regained on a short or long rest.

features.name: Divine Sense
features.text: As an action, until the end of your next turn you detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 feet, plus consecrated or desecrated places. Uses equal to 1 + your Charisma modifier, regained on a long rest.

features.name: Lay on Hands
features.text: You have a pool of healing equal to five times your paladin level. As an action, restore hit points from it, or spend 5 points to cure a disease or neutralize a poison. The pool refreshes on a long rest.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.text: Adopt a fighting style that grants a combat benefit (e.g. Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast paladin spells using Charisma. Prepare CHA mod + half your paladin level spells from the paladin list each day.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.text: When you hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal an extra 2d8 radiant damage, +1d8 per slot level above 1st (max 5d8), and an extra 1d8 against undead or fiends.

features.name: Divine Health
features.text: You're immune to disease.

features.name: Sacred Oath
features.text: Swear a sacred oath that grants oath spells, Channel Divinity options, and features.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.text: Your oath grants Channel Divinity options; you can use one per short or long rest.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: You can attack twice whenever you take the Attack action.

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.text: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet add your Charisma modifier (min +1) to saving throws.

features.name: Aura of Courage
features.text: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet can't be frightened while you're conscious.

features.name: Improved Divine Smite
features.text: Your melee weapon hits deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

features.name: Cleansing Touch
features.text: As an action, end one spell on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Uses equal to your Charisma modifier, regained on a long rest.

resources.name: Lay on Hands
resources.text: Hit points in your Lay on Hands healing pool (5 x paladin level), refreshed on a long rest.

resources.name: Channel Divinity
resources.text: Uses of your oath's Channel Divinity options, regained on a short or long rest.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.text: Choose a type of favored enemy. You have advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track them and Intelligence checks to recall information about them, and you learn a language they speak.

features.name: Natural Explorer
features.text: Choose a favored terrain. While traveling there your group isn't slowed by difficult terrain, can't become lost except by magic, stays alert to danger, and gains other tracking and foraging benefits.

features.name: Fighting Style
features.text: Adopt a fighting style that grants a combat benefit (Archery, Defense, Dueling, or Two-Weapon Fighting).

features.name: Spellcasting
features.text: Cast ranger spells using Wisdom. You know a small, fixed set of ranger spells, learning and swapping more as you level (no cantrips).

features.name: Primeval Awareness
features.text: Expend a spell slot to sense whether aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead are within 1 mile (6 miles in your favored terrain).

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.text: You can attack twice whenever you take the Attack action.

features.name: Land's Stride
features.text: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement; advantage on saves against plants that magically impede movement.

features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
features.text: Spend 1 minute creating camouflage to gain a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks while you remain still.

features.name: Vanish
features.text: You can Hide as a bonus action, and you can't be tracked by nonmagical means.

features.name: Feral Senses
features.text: You don't suffer disadvantage attacking creatures you can't see, and you're aware of invisible creatures within 30 feet.

features.name: Foe Slayer
features.text: Once each turn, add your Wisdom modifier to an attack or damage roll against a favored enemy.

features.name: Expertise
features.text: Choose two of your skill proficiencies (or one skill and your thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on; choose two more at 6th level.

features.name: Sneak Attack
features.text: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon when you have advantage, or when an ally is within 5 feet of the target and you don't have disadvantage. The damage rises by 1d6 at each odd level (up to 10d6 at 19th).

features.name: Thieves' Cant
features.text: You know thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code, and can hide messages in seemingly normal conversation.

features.name: Cunning Action
features.text: On each of your turns, use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.text: Increase ability scores or take a feat.

features.name: Uncanny Dodge
features.text: When an attacker you can see hits you, use a reaction to halve the attack's damage.

features.name: Evasion
features.text: When you make a Dexterity save for half damage, you instead take no damage on a success and half on a failure.

features.name: Reliable Talent
features.text: Whenever you make an ability check using a skill you're proficient in, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

features.name: Blindsense
features.text: You're aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 feet that you can hear.

features.name: Slippery Mind
features.text: You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

features.name: Elusive
features.text: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

features.name: Stroke of Luck
features.text: Once per short or long rest, turn a missed attack into a hit, or a failed ability check into a 20.
